name: fix-unsanitize-paths
details: Fix the bug where additional directories from settings.local.json are not loaded when cwd is a sibling of the project directory. Implement unsanitizePath algorithm to reconstruct project path from sanitized transcript path.

tasks.name: Implement unsanitizePath
tasks.details: Add unsanitizePath function to project-resolver.ts that returns all matching filesystem paths for a given sanitized path string

tasks.name: Test with /tmp scenarios
tasks.details:
Create test directory structures in /tmp to verify the algorithm handles:
- Simple paths
- Hyphenated directory names
- Hidden directories (.claude)
- Ambiguous paths (both /a/b and /a-b exist)

tasks.name: Integrate into core
tasks.details: Update findProjectDirectory and resolveWorkingDirectories to use unsanitizePath instead of walking up from cwd. Handle multiple candidate paths by adding all to working directories.

tasks.name: Build and verify
tasks.details: Run npm build and test the complete flow
